text:
is a former member of the Survey Corps who was in Squad Mike. He brought the news of Wall Rose's breach to Commander Erwin.

Appearance

Thomas is a well-built man of average height. He has dark semi-long hair parted in the middle with a dark goatee and mustache. He is commonly seen wearing the uniform of the Survey Corps with a white v-neck underneath.

Personality

Thomas is a trusted soldier, as he stood alongside other superiors such as Mike Zacharias and Nanaba. He is shown to be very strong, both physically and mentally as he pushes himself to travel on horseback for several hours in order to get the news of Wall Rose's breach to Commander Erwin as fast as possible, only taking a short minute-long break in Ehrmich District to tell the citizens of the Titan invasion.

Story

The Female Titan arc

Thomas is one of several soldiers brought by Mike Zacharias to oversee members of the 104th Training Corps who are suspected to be accomplices of Annie Leonhart. As they discuss the possibility of an ally to Annie being among them, Mike smells several Titans coming from the south side of Wall Rose and he quickly tells Thomas to alert the commanders.

Clash of the Titans arc

Soon after, Thomas arrives in Ehrmich District on horseback, bringing a warning of the incoming Titans and telling the citizens to evacuate. After stopping for water, he asks for the fastest horse they have so he can get the news to Erwin Smith.

Arriving in Stohess District, Thomas barges into a meeting Erwin is attending to alert him of Wall Rose's breach.

Abilities

Trivia

Thomas is not among the 9 survivors of the Battle of Shiganshina District which suggests he died or left the Survey Corps prior.
Thomas's name is Hebrew in origin, meaning "twin."
